titles.en: Chapter on Performing Hajj Using a Trust Deposit
Chapter on Performing Hajj Using a Trust Deposit

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِسْتَوْدَعَنِي مَالاً فَهَلَكَ وَ لَيْسَ لِوُلْدِهِ شَيْءٌ وَ لَمْ يَحُجَّ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ قَالَ «حُجَّ عَنْهُ وَ مَا فَضَلَ فَأَعْطِهِمْ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِسْتَوْدَعَنِي مَالاً فَهَلَكَ وَ لَيْسَ لِوُلْدِهِ شَيْءٌ وَ لَمْ يَحُجَّ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ قَالَ «حُجَّ عَنْهُ وَ مَا فَضَلَ فَأَعْطِهِمْ».

segments:
Hadith.2930 - Suwayd al-Qalla’ narrated from Ayyub ibn Harr, from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I asked him about a man who entrusted me with some money, but he died without leaving anything for his children, and he had not performed the Hajj of Islam.
Imam (as) said: "Perform Hajj on his behalf, and whatever remains, give it to his children."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2930 - Suwayd al-Qalla’ narrated from Ayyub ibn Harr, from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I asked him about a man who entrusted me with some money, but he died without leaving anything for his children, and he had not performed the Hajj of Islam.
Imam (as) said: "Perform Hajj on his behalf, and whatever remains, give it to his children."

narratorChain.raw: 2930 - رَوَى سُوَيْدٌ اَلْقَلاَّءُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ حُرٍّ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
